content:
The Artist: andginja

Andginja is a talented photographer and visual artist based in Lisbon, known for capturing the vibrant essence of urban life and architecture. His photography collection from Lisbon highlights the city's unique charm, blending traditional Portuguese aesthetics with modern perspectives. Through his lens, Andginja brings Lisbon’s streets, colors, and cultural nuances to life, offering a fresh and captivating view of the city.

The Collection: City Collection Alpha

The City Collection Alpha by Andginja is a photography series that celebrates the interplay between urban landscapes and the human spirit, with Lisbon as its centerpiece. Andre sets himself back from the action contrasting the architectural grandeur with intimate street moments. The city’s iconic light is forever tokenized with Andginja’s signature attention to detail and artistic framing. If your collecting thesis is to secure photographs from important cities around the globe, then 'City Collection Alpha' is a must have. The collection stands as a testament to Lisbon’s dynamic character, offering a fresh perspective on a city rich in history and culture.

Collectoors to date include MintFace, 6529 Museum and Apocalypse. Despite the trillions of photographs taken in the last century, there are surprisingly few photos tokenized before the AI proliferation occurred. 

A Specific Artwork: Up The Hills

'Up The Hills' has a timeless quality, that could have been photographed at any time in the last century. The ideal Lisbon representative to join a collection of world cities. 'Up The Hills' is available in The Line Gift Shop for 0.08 eth.

"This photo represents how well Lisbon trams blend with the city, a perfect fusion so unique in this city. This photo is also important because it is constantly and immensely featured on the country's top airline's social media (TAP), representing the perfect postcard of the city."

andginja
andginja | Line 98 andginja on The Line Gift Shop
